summary: Guarded Runはpersistence-only境界を維持し、authority/mirror、Git identity、legacy compatibility、Gate DAG authorityを侵食しない。safe-action、agent/runtime、waiver、mergeは非責務のまま。
inspection_summary: Story、Architecture、17-clause final Spec、Test Plan、CLI、Guarded Run、Git identity、responsibility contracts、current-head証跡を独立照合し、境界・回帰・経路網羅にblocking findingがないと確認した。
inspection_evidence: 依存面はexecution state、Gate readiness、Git identity、workspace、限定artifact IOだけでagent/runtime/action/waiver/merge capabilityなし
supplied runIdはcreateRun先頭でvalid=>run_id_not_allowed、malformed=>invalid_run_idとして副作用前に停止
status without run-idはlegacy getExecutionStatus routeを維持
existing unavailable managed bindingはfail closed、source_fallbackは単一bootstrapとfingerprintに限定、mirrorはauthorityへ昇格しない
authority-first persistenceと明示repair-only mirror同期を確認
judgment_delta: 後付けdocs不整合の懸念はArchitectureとC-003/C-006の同期で解消
silent supplied-id受理の懸念は先頭拒否とpre-fix-failing testで解消
managed authorityの暗黙昇格懸念はfail-closedとfingerprint、mirror非authorityで解消
safe-action/runtime責任先取りの懸念はclosed imports/dependencies/CLI/static testで解消
legacy回帰懸念は専用テストと全1124件で解消
